completed_tasks.name: Create Grafana banking dashboard JSON and smoke test script
End-to-end observability verification
completed_tasks.progress: All code fixes committed (fac61f7, e346ae5). JARs rebuilt with -Dmaven.test.skip=true. Podman machine restarted but was still starting when session paused. Container images NOT yet rebuilt with --build.

remaining_tasks.name: Verify Podman machine Running, podman compose up -d --build, generate transfer, smoke-test --full, browser verify Jaeger/Prometheus/Grafana/Loki, write 02-03-SUMMARY.md

blockers.description: Podman machine was in 'Currently starting' state when session paused. Verify it reached Running before compose up.
blockers.workaround: podman machine list — if not Running, run: podman machine stop && podman machine start

human_actions_pending.action: Check: podman machine list → must show Running. Then: podman compose up -d --build
human_actions_pending.context: Machine was restarted to release JAR file lock. JARs rebuilt with actuator. Need --build to rebuild container images with new JARs.

human_actions_pending.action: Verify full observability pipeline in browser (Steps 3-7 from 02-03-PLAN.md Task 2)
human_actions_pending.context: Jaeger http://localhost:16686, Prometheus http://localhost:9090, Grafana http://localhost:3000, Loki via Grafana Explore

decisions.decision: Always use podman / podman compose — never docker
decisions.rationale: Docker Desktop not installed. Added to CLAUDE.md Conventions.
-DskipTests skips execution but still compiles tests. ledger-service test had missing PostgreSQLContainer causing compile failure. -Dmaven.test.skip=true skips both.

decisions.decision: Podman machine stop/start releases WSL2 JAR file locks
decisions.rationale: After podman compose down, Podman WSL2 machine still held write lock on payment-service JAR. Stopping the machine released it.

decisions.decision: spring-boot-starter-actuator was the sole OTel root cause
decisions.rationale: Without actuator, ObservationRegistry absent from classpath, blocking all OTel auto-configurations. Fixed in e346ae5.
Was temporary for conditions report. Root cause found and fixed. Removed in fac61f7.

next_action: 1. podman machine list — verify Running. 2. podman compose up -d --build. 3. Wait ~90s. 4. ./scripts/smoke-test-obs.sh. 5. POST /api/payments/transfers to generate traffic. 6. Browser verify: Jaeger traces, Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboard, Loki logs. 7. ./scripts/smoke-test-obs.sh --full. 8. Write 02-03-SUMMARY.md.
context_notes: All code fixes committed. OTel pipeline should work after image rebuild: actuator on classpath → ObservationRegistry → all OTel auto-configurations activate. Tracing: management.opentelemetry.tracing.export.otlp.endpoint. Logging: management.opentelemetry.logging.export.otlp.endpoint. Metrics: management.otlp.metrics.export.url. All resolve to http://otel-collector:4318 via OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT env var. Alice: 8687a7c8-a697-45b7-8fc3-6be104db29ad, Bob: f579b5bc-eb58-4022-9b6f-c5189fa76b9f. Transfer endpoint: POST /api/payments/transfers (plural). Stale worktree agent-ac5d1e82 still needs cleanup after phase completes.
